case_title: CESAR ALEXANDER DUARTE VS. JOSE LUIS AZNARANSOTO

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 00.00 - SERVED MAY-06-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT AZNARANSOTO, JOSE LUIS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-17-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DUARTE, CESAR ALEXANDER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AZNARANSOTO, JOSE LUIS $1,761.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,761.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DUARTE, CESAR ALEXANDER ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
DECLARATION OF CESAR A. DUARTE RE: RESET AND UPDATE DEFENDANTS ADDRESS FILED BY PLAINTIFF DUARTE, CESAR ALEXANDER
TRIAL RESET TO JUN-17-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAY-20-2019 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-17-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-17-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF CESAR ALEXANDER DUARTE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOE LUIS AZNARANSOTO IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER JEAN GARASCIA. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)`
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY DUARTE, CESAR ALEXANDER AS TO DEFENDANT AZNARANSOTO, JOSE LUIS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-20-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF DUARTE, CESAR ALEXANDER AS TO RESPONDENT AZNARANSOTO, JOSE LUIS
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 6/25/19. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - VACANT - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED SEP-03-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
